content.text:
Implemented the fix in `packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/3-transform/client/visitors/SnippetBlock.js`.

What changed:
- Async snippets now keep using the enclosing fragment’s `Memoizer`, so awaited expressions inside snippets are wired into the surrounding async/template effect machinery correctly.
- Non-async snippets get their own fresh `Memoizer`, preserving the previous isolation behavior and avoiding leakage into the parent render effect.

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary runtime-runes regression sample reproducing an awaited expression rendered inside a snippet.
- Confirmed the test passes after the fix.
- Ran targeted related tests:

```sh
pnpm exec vitest run packages/svelte/tests/runtime-runes/test.ts -t "async-snippet-await-captured|async-render-tag|snippet" --reporter=verbose
```

Result:
- `167 passed`
- `1575 skipped`
- No failures.

Cleanup:
- Removed the temporary regression test sample as requested.
- Did not commit changes.

Note: `git status` shows pre-existing unrelated changes/untracked files (`package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, logs/results). The only source file I modified is:

```text
packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/3-transform/client/visitors/SnippetBlock.js
```
